Modern defending got you hyped?

Capello's AC Milan in '93-94 conceded just 15 goals in 34 Serie A games. FIFTEEN. Then dismantled Cruyff's Barcelona 4-0 in the CL final, WITHOUT Baresi AND Costacurta! That's defensive mastery you won't see again. Absolute legends.

#ACMilan #SerieA #UCL #FootballHistory
